them. The native will be absolutely detached
(Saturn-Ketu conjunction and exchange of places between Mars and Saturn
and the result being influenced by Jupiter on one side and Ketu in the same
house). There will not be a trace of selfishness in him. In his 45th year, the
native's fame will reach the peak point when Royal favours will be bestowed
on him. He will remain a batchelor till 40 years of age. He will become rich
and get married between 41-42 years. He will convert bis wife also into his
own line of approach to life, build up several religious institutions and per
fonn many holy religious ceremonies.
He will suffer from wind troubles (Jupiter and Saturn in adjoining
houses) as well as from piles or stomach trouble and have an operation in his
48th year or before 5.0th year. He will live upto 76 years.
This native will be a oom helper of humanity coming into this world

144 BHRJGU NANDI NADI
with the blessing of gods.
He will have five children.
